description: Baseline resume run with current test suite; branch coverage 98.71% with checks passing.
Tried explicit commitPatchUpdate test for unset pipeline options branch in lifecycle/patch/commit; coverage remained unchanged at 98.71% (branch likely already covered or unaffected by aggregate).

Tried strengthening snapshot/workletRef _wkltId queue assertions plus __DEV__=false setter coverage in workletRef tests; benchmark run failed due incorrect onWorkletCtxUpdate expectation in workletRef-branch test.
Covered MainThreadRef setter branch in __DEV__=false mode by extending workletRef test to assert setter is a no-op; branch coverage improved to 98.79% with checks passing.

Added isolated commit-pipeline branch test expecting commitPatchUpdate to omit pipelineOptions when pipeline is unset; aggregate branch coverage stayed flat at 98.79%, and commit.ts missing branch remained uncovered.
